summary: App crashes with IndexOutOfBoundsException when starting a video+audio download
description: Steps to reproduce: open the download dialog for a video, let the audio stream list refresh (e.g. switch quality once, then tap Download). The app force-closes instead of starting the download. The muxed-audio helper looks up a cached stream position that no longer matches the current stream list, so the list access goes out of bounds. Attaching the logcat FATAL EXCEPTION captured on a Pixel 6 (Android 14). Happens every time once the stream list has been re-fetched.

logs.content:
FATAL EXCEPTION: main
Process: com.app.stream, PID: 14237
java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 3 out of bounds for length 2
	at java.util.ArrayList.get(ArrayList.java:427)
	at com.app.stream.util.SecondaryStreamHelper.getStream(SecondaryStreamHelper.java:69)
	at com.app.stream.download.DownloadDialog.continueSelectedDownload(DownloadDialog.java:1066)
	at com.app.stream.download.DownloadDialog.prepareSelectedDownload(DownloadDialog.java:922)
	at com.app.stream.download.DownloadDialog.lambda$onCreateView$4(DownloadDialog.java:352)
	at android.view.View.performClick(View.java:7659)
	at android.view.View$PerformClick.run(View.java:29429)
	at android.os.Handler.handleCallback(Handler.java:958)
	at android.os.Handler.dispatchMessage(Handler.java:99)
	at android.os.Looper.loopOnce(Looper.java:205)
	at android.os.Looper.loop(Looper.java:294)
	at android.app.ActivityThread.main(ActivityThread.java:8177)
	at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Native Method)
	at com.android.internal.os.RuntimeInit$MethodAndArgsCaller.run(RuntimeInit.java:552)
	at com.android.internal.os.ZygoteInit.main(ZygoteInit.java:971)
